title: Making a complaint
setting: The fan you bought last week stopped working. You return to the store with your receipt.

steps.speaker: Empleada
steps.en: Hello. How can I help you?

options.es: Compré este ventilador y ya no funciona.
options.en: I bought this fan and it no longer works.
options.feedback: Clear and factual — states the problem without aggression. Exactly right.
Starting hostile puts her on the defensive. Calm and factual gets better results.

options.en: I have a problem with this.
options.feedback: Okay, but vague. Saying what's actually wrong moves things faster.

steps.speaker: Empleada
steps.es: ¿Tiene el recibo y cuánto hace que lo compró?
steps.en: Do you have the receipt, and how long ago did you buy it?

options.es: Sí, aquí está. Lo compré hace una semana.
options.en: Yes, here it is. I bought it a week ago.
options.feedback: Receipt plus a clear timeframe — you're making her job easy. Perfect.
Harder without it, but worth trying. Bring the receipt when you can.

options.en: A long time ago, I don't remember.
options.feedback: Vague timing weakens your case — and warranties have limits. Be specific.

steps.speaker: Empleada
steps.en: Let me check. What solution are you looking for?

options.es: Quiero un cambio o que me devuelvan el dinero.
options.en: I want an exchange or my money back.
options.feedback: Stating your desired outcome clearly is exactly how to resolve a complaint.
Polite, but naming what you want protects your interest. Don't be shy here.

options.en: I don't know, you tell me.
options.feedback: Hands her all the power. Knowing your ask gives you footing.

steps.speaker: Empleada
steps.es: Tiene razón, está en garantía. Le doy uno nuevo.
steps.en: You're right, it's under warranty. I'll give you a new one.

options.es: Se lo agradezco mucho. Muy amable.
options.en: I appreciate it very much. Very kind.
options.feedback: Gracious in victory — leaving on good terms is smart and warm.

options.es: Por fin. Debió ser más rápido.
options.feedback: She just helped you! Souring it at the end burns goodwill you may need again.
Clean and polite. A satisfying close to a complaint handled well.
